How to Use Frequency: 1 to 2 times a day. Area: Face, neck, and décolleté. Application: Can be used in the morning and/or evening, or as a makeup base. Texture & Scent Texture: Fresh and light texture provides immediate comfort to the skin and makes it an excellent makeup base. Product Scent: Floral and delicate. name: Avène Couvrance Concealer Stick
descr: This concealer stick is highly pigmented for covering and blurring skin imperfections. All color options are fragrance-free and suitable for sensitive skin. Practical to use and ea
long_desc: This concealer stick is highly pigmented for covering and blurring skin imperfections. All color options are fragrance-free and suitable for sensitive skin. Practical to use and easy to carry, it offers SPF 20 protection. What You'll Love: The green concealer is used to cover red skin imperfections such as couperose, rosacea, red scars, acne and birthmarks. SPF20. The yellow concealer covers bluish skin imperfections such as bruises, post-surgical bruises and bruises, single blood vessels, varicose veins and dark circles under the eyes. SPF20. The coral -toned concealer is intended to cover excessive skin pigmentation such as liver spots, melasma and brown scars. SPF30. Benefits: Masks localized skin imperfections and redness. Resistant to water, transfer and sweat. Photo-Protective thanks to its SPF20 sun filters which protect sensitive skin. Clinical Results: Tested in the Dermatological Research Center: A range of corrective treatments to play with colors to correct all types of imperfections. Texture Benefit: A smooth, creamy texture that glides on easily and blends seamlessly, providing natural coverage without caking. Product Scent: Fragrance-free. How to Use: Pick up with your fingertip. Apply by tapping on the brown imperfection until a light beige shade is obtained. On very localized imperfections, pick up and spread using a fine brush, then fix by tapping with your fingertip. Ingredients: Diisostearyl malate, Titanium dioxide (CI 77891), Silica, PPG-3 myristyl ether, Bis-diglyceryl polyacyladipate-2, Octyldodecanol, Ethylhexyl methoxycinnamate, Polyethylene, Titanium dioxide [nano], Hydrogenated castor oil, Beeswax (Cera alba), Isononyl isononanoate, Chromium oxide greens (CI 77288), Zinc oxide [nano], Aluminum hydroxide, BHT, Blue 1 lake (CI 42090), Caprylic/capric triglyceride, Disteardimonium hectorite, Iron oxides (CI 77492), Mica, SD alcohol 39-C (alcohol denat.), Stearic acid, Tocopherol, Tocopheryl glucoside, Triethoxycaprylylsilane, Water (aqua).

name: Elgydium Clinic Ortho X Adult Toothbrush
descr: <h3><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);">The Elgydium Clinic Orthodontics Toothbrush for adults is specifically designed for effective and gentle cleaning for individuals wearing bra
long_desc:
The Elgydium Clinic Orthodontics Toothbrush for adults is specifically designed for effective and gentle cleaning for individuals wearing braces.

Clinical Results:
Delivers optimal cleaning around braces and brackets, ensuring a thorough and comfortable brushing experience.

Benefits:

  • U-Trim Profile: Precisely cleans around braces and orthodontic appliances.
  • Soft & Gentle Bristles: Tynex® bristles are kind to sensitive gums and teeth.
  • Flexible Head: Adapts to the mouth for enhanced comfort.
  • Small Head: Enables precise cleaning in hard-to-reach areas.

What Makes It Unique:
Patented crossed bristles and U-trim design for targeted cleaning of braces and brackets.

Free From:
Harsh materials that may damage orthodontic appliances or irritate gums.
